summary: Retest of the two previously-failing fixes. Both fixes are now present in code and verified live: (1) Navbar 'nav-user' chip is a <Link to='/dashboard'> and clicking it navigates to /dashboard. (2) /join route renders JoinByCode with case-insensitive code handling — uppercase input is lowercased/trimmed before GET /api/rooms/{code}; unauthenticated users are redirected to /login (with pendingRoom stashed), logged-in users get a 'No room found with that code' toast for bogus codes.
passed: GET /join loads JoinByCode with join-code-input and join-code-submit
Unauthenticated submit of uppercase bogus code redirects to /login (pendingRoom flow)
Login with sidroks@hotmail.com / streamstar@1 succeeds and lands on /dashboard
Navbar nav-user is <a href='/dashboard'> and click navigates to /dashboard
Logged-in submit of uppercase bogus code shows 'No room found with that code' toast (confirms case-insensitive room lookup path)
